Justification: Ensure the app, dashboard, and chatbot UI follow corporate branding (logo, colors, tone), so new tools feel consistent and trustworthy to stakeholders.
Specifications: GAP brand kit (logo, color palette, typography) shared by Brand team; applied in React/Next.js web app via Tailwind theme tokens.

Justification: Align ingestion, storage, and API design with existing org standards for reliability, security, and maintainability of the A/B discovery platform.
Specifications: REST APIs (FastAPI, OpenAPI 3.0); JSON over HTTPS; Google OAuth ID tokens; Cloud Logging structured logs; semantic versioning; Git-based IaC (Terraform).

Justification: Design low- and high-fidelity flows for dashboard and chatbot, collaborate with stakeholders, and hand off specs to engineers.
Specifications: Figma Professional, 2 editor seats (1 designer + 1 PM); shared GAP Experimentation workspace.

Justification: Support faster exploration of requirements, interview synthesis, and early concept writing (prompts, UX copy, experiment descriptions).
Specifications: Claude Pro, 2 seats (PM + lead engineer).

Justification: Track epics, user stories, and tasks for the end-to-end project lifecycle, from discovery through build and deployment.
Specifications: Existing GAP Jira tenant; new project key GAPGENAI; Scrum board, 2-week sprints; ~8 user seats.

Justification: Coordinate interviews, workshops, and day-to-day communication across PM, design, data, and engineering teams.
Specifications: Existing GAP M365 tenant; dedicated Teams channel #gap-genai-poc; Outlook calendar for stand-ups.

Justification: Provide a managed notebook environment to explore data, prototype RAG pipelines, and run experiments on embeddings and ranking.
Specifications: GCP project: gap-genai-poc; Region: us-central1; 1x user-managed instance; machine n1-standard-4 (4 vCPU / 15 GiB); 100 GB SSD; Python 3.11 image; auto-shutdown after 60 min idle.

Justification: Programmatically read experiment documentation pages from Confluence as the primary unstructured data source for the RAG system.
Specifications: Atlassian Confluence Cloud PAT scoped to read:content + read:space; service account user with read access to Test and Learn COE space; stored in Secret Manager as confluence-pat.

Justification: Host stateless backend services (APIs, RAG orchestrator, summarization services) in a scalable, managed container environment.
Specifications: Region us-central1; 2 services. (1) gap-genai-web: 1 vCPU / 1 GiB, concurrency 80, min/max 0/5. (2) gap-genai-orch: 2 vCPU / 4 GiB, concurrency 20, min/max 1/10, CPU always-on, request timeout 300s. Reaches BigQuery via public Google APIs over IAM auth (no VPC connector needed).

Justification: Run batch ingestion and re-indexing jobs (e.g., nightly Confluence crawls, embedding refresh) in a managed, containerized way.
Specifications: Region us-central1; 2 jobs sharing 1 image. (1) gap-ingest-bulk: 4 vCPU / 8 GiB, task timeout 3h, manual trigger. (2) gap-ingest-delta: 2 vCPU / 4 GiB, task timeout 30 min, triggered by Cloud Scheduler.

Justification: Trigger recurring tasks such as data refresh jobs, evaluation runs, and maintenance operations on a schedule.
Specifications: 1 schedule: daily-delta-trigger; cron 0 9 * * * UTC (02:00 PT); HTTP target -> Cloud Run Jobs API to start gap-ingest-delta; OIDC auth with sa-ingest.

Justification: Single managed datastore for the POC. Holds raw Confluence HTML/markdown (with version + is_current columns instead of GCS object versioning), chunks, document and chunk metadata, app_config (model_config / prompt template / policies as JSON rows, hot-reloaded on 60s poll), feedback, request logs, pipeline_jobs, ingestion_state, golden_evals. Replaces both Cloud SQL and Cloud Storage from the earlier design. Conversation history and long-term user memory are stored in Vertex AI Agent Engine — see rows 32 and 33 — not in BigQuery.
Specifications: Location US (multi-region); 2 datasets: gap_genai_corpus (raw_pages partitioned by DATE(fetched_at) clustered by page_id; chunks partitioned by DATE(created_at) clustered by doc_id; document_metadata; chunk_metadata) and gap_genai_app (app_config, feedback, request_logs partitioned by DATE(ts), prompt_filter_log, pipeline_jobs, ingestion_state, golden_evals, eval_runs_summary view). On-demand pricing for POC; partition expiration on logs (90 days); BI Engine reservation 1 GiB for dashboard tiles; CMEK optional. IAM: roles/bigquery.dataEditor on sa-ingest + sa-orch; roles/bigquery.dataViewer on sa-web + admin group.
Notes: Replaces Cloud SQL row + Cloud Storage row from earlier versions

Justification: Not provisioned for the POC. Raw Confluence HTML/markdown is stored as TEXT rows (with version + is_current columns) in BigQuery gap_genai_corpus.raw_pages; model_config / prompt template / policies are stored as JSON rows in gap_genai_app.app_config. Reintroduce in Phase 2 only if/when binary attachments (PDFs, images) need to be served.
Specifications: Removed from Day-1 scope. No buckets
column9: Removed in v2.4 — replaced by BigQuery

Justification: Persist and query vector embeddings of experiment content to enable low-latency semantic search over Confluence pages.
Specifications: Region us-central1; index gap-experiments-chunks-v1; algorithm TreeAH; 768 dimensions; cosine distance; approx-neighbors 50; SHARD_SIZE_SMALL; STREAM_UPDATE; 1 public index endpoint deployed on e2-standard-2, min/max replicas = 1; expected vectors Phase 1: ~5K-10K.

Justification: Access pre-built foundation models and embeddings baselines, accelerating experimentation without managing custom model deployments from scratch.
Specifications: Enable Model Garden in project; request access for Anthropic Claude Opus 4.6 GA in us-east5 (primary synthesis model); Gemini 2.5 Pro GA in us-central1 (fallback / cheap-task / judge - no extra request).
Notes: Updated 2026-05-13 - two-model decision (Opus 4.6 primary + Gemini 2.5 Pro fallback)

Justification: Configure multi-step RAG/agent workflows (query decomposition, tool calling, answer synthesis) without wiring all orchestration logic manually.
Specifications: Discovery Engine search app (RAG) in region 'global'; 1 unstructured data store backed by the Vector Search index; semantic-ranker-default-001 enabled; Grounding with inline citations enabled; default search QPS quota.

Justification: Generate text embeddings for Confluence content and user queries as input to vector search and ranking components.
Specifications: Model text-embedding-004 (768-dim); region us-central1; batch up to 250 inputs per call; quota target 600 RPM; IAM roles/aiplatform.user on sa-ingest and sa-orch.

Justification: Re-rank candidate experiment documents for a query to improve relevance and result ordering beyond basic vector similarity.
Specifications: semantic-ranker-default-001 via Agent Builder; rerank top-50 -> top-10; default quota; latency target < 250 ms.

Justification: Run heavier custom workloads or experimental services that need more control over environment than managed platforms provide.
Specifications: Not required for POC. BigQuery is queried via public Google APIs from Cloud Run + Workbench; no jump host needed.

Justification: Securely store and manage credentials and tokens (e.g., Confluence API keys) used across services and jobs.
Specifications: Secrets: confluence-pat, anthropic-api-key (only if calling Anthropic outside Model Garden); automatic replication; access via secretmanager.secretAccessor on per-workload SAs. No DB password needed (BigQuery uses IAM auth).

Justification: Store container images and other build artifacts for Cloud Run, Cloud Run Jobs, and Compute Engine deployments.
Specifications: 1 Docker repo gap-genai-images, region us-central1, Standard tier; images orch:<sha>, web:<sha>, ingest:<sha>; vulnerability scanning on.

Justification: Implement automated build and deployment pipelines for backend services, jobs, and infrastructure changes.
Specifications: Cloud Build connected to GitHub repo (gap/genai-poc); triggers on main and PRs; default e2-standard-2 worker pool; build & push to Artifact Registry then deploy to Cloud Run / Jobs via gcloud.

Justification: Primary telemetry store: Cloud Logging + Monitoring + Trace + Profiler + Error Reporting. Collects logs from ingestion jobs, APIs, and RAG components; drives SLO dashboards, alerting, and finance/cost reporting (LLM token + model usage).
Specifications: Cloud Logging (structured JSON from Cloud Run / Jobs) + Cloud Monitoring + Cloud Trace (OTel + ADK exporter) + Cloud Profiler + Error Reporting; log-based metrics for request_count / latency_p95 / model_id / llm_tokens_in/out; 30-day default retention; BigQuery is NOT used as a log sink (AR-5, 2026-05-25 architect review).
Notes: Replaces the earlier Pub/Sub -> BigQuery request_logs sink

Justification: Manage TLS certificates for secure HTTPS endpoints exposed by Cloud Run or load balancers, ensuring encrypted client access.
Specifications: Managed certificates for Cloud Run custom domain (e.g., genai.gap.com); Google-managed cert via Certificate Manager + domain mapping on gap-genai-web.

Justification: Improve engineering productivity when implementing services, infrastructure as code, and data-processing logic.
Specifications: GitHub Copilot Business, 4 seats (3 engineers + 1 lead).

Justification: Assist with code generation, refactoring, and debugging for data pipelines, backends, and integration scripts.
Specifications: Claude Code (Anthropic), 2 seats (lead engineer + senior dev).

Justification: Optional in v2.4 — BigQuery is reached over public Google APIs with IAM auth
Specifications: so no VPC connector is required for POC. Provision only if VPC-SC perimeter is added in Phase 2.
Notes: Default VPC in gap-genai-poc with Private Google Access on. Serverless VPC Access connector is NOT provisioned for POC; reintroduce (genai-connector, e2-micro, /28 range, us-central1) only when locking BigQuery + Vertex into a VPC-SC perimeter.
column8: Removed from Day-1 scope in v2.4

Justification: Enforce least-privilege per workload (orchestration, web, ingestion, log sink) and per user group.
Specifications: 4 service accounts: sa-orch, sa-web, sa-ingest, sa-logsink; 2 Google Groups: gap-genai-users@gap.com (run.invoker on web) and gap-genai-admins@gap.com (admin endpoints + config-bucket writer).

Justification: RETIRED at 2026-05-25 architect review — was previously used to decouple Cloud Logging from a BigQuery log sink; Observability Suite now keeps telemetry natively (AR-5). Kept only if a future use case requires it.
Specifications: n/a (decommission planned)

Justification: Restrict access to gap.com domain users for the chatbot and dashboard.
Specifications: Existing GAP Workspace tenant; OAuth 2.0 client (web) for the React app; hd=gap.com domain restriction; admin role granted via Google Group membership.

Requirements: Vertex AI Agent Engine (Sessions + Memory Bank)
Justification: Managed per-session conversation store plus long-term cross-session user memory. Replaces what would otherwise have been conversation tables in the operational datastore.
Specifications: Region us-central1; 1 Agent Engine resource gap-genai-agent; Sessions enabled with 90-day TTL keyed on session_id; Memory Bank enabled, scoped per Google Workspace email, LLM-curation on session close (Gemini 2.5 Pro); IAM roles/aiplatform.user on sa-orch; default request quota.
Notes: Added in v2.3 - replaces conversation tables

Requirements: Vertex AI Evaluation Service + Vertex AI Experiments
Justification: Managed eval pipeline that supports LLM-as-judge metrics and side-by-side track comparison (main RAG vs. Vectorless RAG Spike). Eval run summaries are projected back into BigQuery gap_genai_app.eval_runs_summary view for dashboard rollups.
Specifications: Region us-central1; 1 Experiments project gap-genai-evals; built-in metrics groundedness / answer_relevance / coherence + 1 custom LLM-as-judge metric (citation_accuracy, judge = Gemini 2.5 Pro); golden eval set ~50 queries stored as rows in BigQuery gap_genai_app.golden_evals; trigger: CI on prompt/model_config change + weekly Cloud Scheduler run + on-demand admin endpoint.
Notes: Added in v2.3 - golden set in BigQuery (no GCS bucket)
